top_signals.title: AustralianSuper Hires AI Chief as Pension Funds Race to Adapt
top_signals.summary: AustralianSuper, the nation’s largest pension fund, has hired its first head of artificial intelligence as the industry grapples with how rapidly evolving technology could reshape retirement finance.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
